rationale: Section 45.086 is a general liberal construction clause directing broad interpretation of the subchapter's powers. It imposes no operative funding or exemption requirement that would conflict with adjusting the Tax Code homestead exemption amount.
quote: This subchapter shall be construed liberally to accomplish the legislative intent and the purposes of the subchapter, and all powers granted by this subchapter shall be broadly interpreted to accomplish that intent and those purposes and not as a limitation of powers.
_note: No direct conflict; §45.086 is a rule of construction, not an operative provision tied to exemption amounts or revenue floors.
